creator: neal@nelson.name
text:
On Fri, 2007-01-12 at 06:42 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/py-twistedNames,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107845 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107845

Please go ahead and commit this update.
